team.name: Meera Kulkarni
team.bio: Meera covers the macro economy and public finance. She previously reported on the RBI and the Union Budget for a national daily.

team.name: Arjun Nair
team.bio: Arjun writes on markets and corporate finance. Before journalism, he spent five years as a sell-side equity analyst.

team.name: Sana Qureshi
team.bio: Sana reports on industry, manufacturing and trade, with a focus on what official datasets reveal about India’s factories.

team.name: Dev Patel
team.bio: Dev is our data editor. He writes explainers on statistics, survey design and the fine print behind India’s official numbers.

team.name: Ishita Rao
team.bio: Ishita covers society, consumption and technology adoption across urban and rural India.
